---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the pool, the announcer, or the verifier surface
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What privacy or correctness gap are you trying to close. Describe it from the user's side
first, then the on-chain side.

## Proposed change

What instruction, account, or constraint would change. Note whether it touches the wire
format (instruction or account discriminators), the verifying key, or the SDK.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to reach the same goal, and why this one.

## Impact

- Wire format: changed / unchanged
- Verifying key: changed / unchanged
- Cross-repo: does `jat-circuits` or `jat-sdk` need a matching change
